You're Invited ✦

Will you be attending
Eryn's Debut
on March 30?

We're so sorry to hear that,
!

You will be dearly missed. 💕
Eryn hopes to celebrate with you another time.

Your role is being chosen…

Click To Continue

See you at the celebration! 💕

ROLE: ROSES

Those chosen as Roses are invited to offer the debutant a small token of affection — not of petals, but of memories, music, and moments. You may choose one of the following: ✦ A TikTok Dance A short solo dance offered in honor of the debutante. (A dance of celebration — not a partnered dance.) ✦ A Short Story Share a cherished memory with the debutante, accompanied by photos that capture the moment. ✦ A Song Refrain Sing a short refrain from a song dedicated to the debutante — a melody that reminds you of her. Note: Choose wisely, dear Rose. Once your selection is made, it cannot be changed. Each Rose may present only one offering.

Click To Continue

ROLE: GIFT

You have been chosen to bring a gift for the debutante — a token of your love and affection. Your specific gift category will be revealed to you shortly. Please ensure your gift is wrapped beautifully and presented with care on the evening of the celebration. A gift given with love is a memory that lasts forever. 🎁

Click To Continue

ROLE: BALLOONS

You have been entrusted with the Balloons — one of the most joyful roles of the evening! Your task is to help fill the celebration venue with beautiful balloons in the chosen colour palette. Please coordinate with the event team upon arrival to arrange the balloon display. Your colours and joy will set the tone for a magical night. 🎈

Click To Continue

ROLE: BILLS

You have been chosen to present the gift of Bills — a generous and practical token of love. Your cash gift will be presented to the debutante during the celebration as a symbol of your support for her future. Please prepare your gift in a beautiful envelope and present it with warmth and sincerity. After all, a bright future is the greatest gift of all. 💵

Click To Continue

SPECIAL ROLE: PHOTOGRAPHER

Every great story needs someone to capture it. As the Photographer, you hold one of the most treasured roles of the evening. Your lens will preserve the moments that words cannot — the laughter, the tears, the beauty of this once-in-a-lifetime night. Please bring your camera and be ready to capture candid moments throughout the celebration. You are not just taking photos. You are creating memories that will last a lifetime. 📸

Click To Continue

HIGHLY VALUABLE GUEST

You are a Highly Valuable Guest ✨ Your presence at this celebration is a gift beyond measure. Eryn is overjoyed to have you as part of her special night. Simply arrive, enjoy every moment, and let yourself be celebrated alongside the debutante. No role, no task — just your wonderful presence is all that is needed. Welcome. 🌸

Click To Continue

🌸

YOU'RE ALL SET,

Your attendance has been noted for
Eryn's Debut — March 30
at The Legacy Function Hall, Aringay, La Union.

Please remember your role and come prepared. Eryn cannot wait to see you! 💕

💌

WE'LL MISS YOU,

We completely understand. Life has its own plans, and that's okay.

However, since you will not be attending, we kindly ask that you personally let the debutante know as soon as possible.

📱 Please message or call Eryn directly to let her know you won't be able to make it.

She deserves to hear it from you personally — a quick message means the world. 🌸

Your presence will be dearly missed, but your thoughtfulness in letting her know will be remembered.

✅

RSVP SUBMITTED!

Your response has been received. Thank you so much for being part of Eryn's debut story.

Please come prepared for your role and arrive dressed in the celebration's chosen shades.

See you on March 30 at The Legacy Function Hall, Aringay, La Union. 💕
